items.title: fetch flow and the res.ok check
items.mermaid:
flowchart TD A["await fetch(url, opts)"] --> B{"network ok?"} B -- no --> R["Promise rejects
(try/catch)"] B -- yes --> C["Response received"] C --> D{"res.ok? (2xx)"} D -- no --> E["throw on 4xx/5xx
e.g. 429 rate limit"] D -- yes --> F["await res.json()"]
items.caption: fetch rejects only on network failure; HTTP error statuses still resolve, so you must check res.ok and throw.
